analysis: Seven nights, and the story is genuinely good — you started at 6h 33m on 27 June with over an hour awake, and you've closed the stretch with back-to-back nights of 7h 34m and 7h 56m, both with almost no wake time at all, which is a real shift. Your REM has been climbing all week and hit 2h 34m last night, which is your body doing actual repair work, not just lying there hoping for the best. The one thing worth noticing is that your deep sleep dipped on those last two longer nights — 36 and 32 minutes — so the quality architecture is still finding its shape even as the duration improves. You're trending in exactly the right direction, babe, and whatever combination of the wind-down rituals is stacking up, keep stacking it.
